inputs.label: Number of data points (n)
inputs.businessContext: Total count of paired (x,y) data points.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total count of paired (x,y) data points.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de paires de points de données (x,y).
businessContext_i18n.es: Recuento total de pares de datos (x,y).

inputs.label: Sum of X values (Σx)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all x-values in the dataset.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all x-values in the dataset.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veri kümesindeki tüm x değerlerinin toplamı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme de toutes les valeurs x dans l'ensemble de données.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de todos los valores x en el conjunto de datos.

inputs.label: Sum of Y values (Σy)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all y-values in the dataset.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all y-values in the dataset.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veri kümesindeki tüm y değerlerinin toplamı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme de toutes les valeurs y dans l'ensemble de données.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de todos los valores y en el conjunto de datos.

inputs.label: Sum of X*Y (Σxy)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of the products of each x-y pair.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of the products of each x-y pair.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme des produits de chaque paire x-y.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de los productos de cada par x-y.

inputs.label: Sum of X² (Σx²)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of the squares of x-values.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of the squares of x-values.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme des carrés des valeurs x.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de los cuadrados de los valores x.

inputs.label: Sum of Y² (Σy²)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of the squares of y-values.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of the squares of y-values.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme des carrés des valeurs y.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de los cuadrados de los valores y.

formulas.slope: (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / (n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
